sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, str_col String, num_col Float32, null_col Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, '', 3.14, NULL), (2, 'test', -1.0, 10), (3, 'example', 0.0, NULL), (4, 'string', 8.5, 5);
SELECT hex(BLAKE3(concat(str_col, toString(num_col)))) FROM test_table WHERE num_col < 0 AND null_col IS NULL;
SELECT id, hex(BLAKE3(str_col)) AS hash_value FROM test_table WHERE NOT (str_col < '') GROUP BY id HAVING count() > 1;
SELECT hex(BLAKE3(str_col)) FROM (SELECT str_col, num_col FROM test_table WHERE num_col != 0) WHERE id < 4 ORDER BY hex(BLAKE3(str_col));
SELECT id, hex(BLAKE3(concat(str_col, toString(null_col)))) FROM test_table WHERE null_col < 5 OR null_col IS NULL;
SELECT id, hex(BLAKE3(str_col)), num_col FROM test_table WHERE str_col = 'test' AND (num_col < 10 OR toString(num_col) = '3.14') ORDER BY hex(BLAKE3(str_col));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (5, 'another test', NULL, 20), (6, 'hash test', -100.5, NULL);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE hex(BLAKE3(str_col)) < 'FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF';
